summary: Comprehensive testing of Ombra AI agent system completed. Backend APIs fully functional (17/17 tests passed). Frontend mostly working with excellent UX, only one minor tab rendering issue in Settings.

ui_bugs.issue: Learning tab content not rendering when clicked - shows Runtime content instead
ui_bugs.details: Tab navigation works but Learning tab content (learning switch, white card settings, quiet hours) not displaying. Code structure looks correct in Settings.js lines 180-233.

passed_tests: Backend health check - all services online
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Settings Learning tab content rendering issue. The tab click works but content doesn't switch from Runtime to Learning view. Check Tabs component implementation or CSS styling that might be hiding the Learning tab content.
